title: Fox API
body:
# Fox API

Fox API is a library required by some mods for configuration. For now this is the list of mods which requires [Fox API](<https://modrinth.com/mod/fox-api>):

- [TPA](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tpa)
- [RTP](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rtp-forge)
- [No Dimensions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nodimensions)
